productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Bright Assorted Red Cufflinks
description: A reinterpretation of the artsy silk single knot cufflinks by Reid and Taylor that comes in a standard size to Fit all. Add a dash of colour to your suit-and-tie staples with this silk knotted accessory. Coordinate these cufflinks with a tonal tie and a formal suit or a crisp shirt and formal trousers. Width: 1 cm Three tone silk knot cufflink Cylindrical back to hold the cufflink in place Elastication holding together the round cufflink and the cylindrical back
